subject: Now Available at Rani: {{service_name}}
preheader: We're excited to introduce a new treatment backed by clinical science and designed for results.
htmlContent:
RANI

BEAUTY CLINIC

New Treatment

Introducing {{service_name}}

{{first_name}},

We are always evaluating new technologies and treatments against a high standard: does it deliver consistent, clinically validated results for our patients? When the answer is a clear yes, we bring it to Rani.

Today, we are excited to announce the addition of {{service_name}} to our treatment menu.

What It Does

{{service_description}}

Who It's For

{{ideal_candidate_description}}

What to Expect

{{treatment_experience}}

Be Among the First

As a valued member of the Rani community, you have early access to book {{service_name}} before we open availability to the general public.

BOOK YOUR CONSULTATION

We look forward to sharing this new treatment with you. As always, the first step is a consultation where we discuss your goals and determine if this treatment is the right fit.

Warmly,
The Rani Team

Rani Beauty Clinic | Washington State
